demo: Tiny three-cluster fixture used in unit tests and tutorials.
failure_storm: Multiple node failures within one window — exercises recovery and re-placement.
gang_scheduling: Cross-cluster gang with linked worker, eval, and metric pods.
multi_cluster_ramp: Inference traffic ramps up and spreads across regions.
node_drain: A cordon-and-drain on one node; pods migrate to siblings.
preemption_cascade: High-priority arrival forces a chain of suspensions.
production_scale: Steady-state production fleet (15 clusters, ~20k GPUs, ~30 quotas) walking through a node failure, a large training arrival forcing reclaim, and a completion.
